q: Solar energy is the radiant ___ and ___ from the sun.
The total amount of radiation energy passing through per unit area and per unit time is called ___.
Irradiance is measured in $W \cdot m^{-2}$ or ___.
Another commonly used term for irradiance of sunlight is ___.
The solar radiation intensity above the earth's atmosphere is known as the ___.
Conversion of light energy into electrical energy is based on a phenomenon called ___ effect.
A solar cell is basically a ___-junction diode.
Individual solar cells can be combined to form modules commonly known as ___.
Power conversion efficiency of the solar panel is the ratio of the electrical power delivered by the panel to the solar power ___ by it.
Flat plate collectors have ___ pipes attached to an absorber plate.
Concentrated solar power (CSP) systems generate solar power by using ___ or lenses.
A wind turbine converts wind energy into ___, which can then be used to power electrical equipment.
The amount of power that can be harvested from wind depends on the size of the ___ and the length of its blades.
The output of a wind turbine is proportional to the ___ of the wind speed.
Hydroelectric energy harnesses the power of water in ___.
A ___ is a closed conduit that channels the flow of water to turbines with water flow regulated by gates and valves.
Tidal energy is produced by the gravitational pull of mainly the ___ on the spinning earth.
Tidal energy is harnessed by constructing a dam (a tidal ___) across a narrow opening to the sea.
Ocean thermal-energy conversion plants exploit the difference in ___ to obtain energy.
Geothermal energy is a type of renewable energy taken from the Earth's ___.
Thermal energy from ___ can be used to generate electricity.
___ is renewable organic material that comes from plants and animals.
Biomass gasification produces a carbon monoxide and hydrogen rich gas called synthesis gas or ___.
The chemical conversion process known as ___ is used for converting vegetable oils into biodiesel.
Biological conversion includes fermentation to convert biomass into ___.
